textByHashes.11a376305eb9de86f39ad71f4b5cde46cb2aaa5a: And we'll move this little penguin here...and KABLOOM! Heee hee.
textByHashes.b54b85ec3a44b55bdba215da3b7977941ee2ce58: It appears we have a visitor!
textByHashes.814c6e5bbe90d5e2c5d1e6598fbb8083e1082d47: Haa haa! I am glad we installed that anti-magic security. What have we here?
textByHashes.8acdf7ab99cee598c23bef9dcebe85fbe9c714c8: What an ingenious little device. This will solve all our problems. Scientists! Come examine this; we have much work to do.
textByHashes.d6129e73e9f7c1b43b6eed3bb3e831bb30cf333f: Hmm, take that human to the Ice Lords. They'll enjoy the exercise.
